channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ireland Thinks for Sunday Independent, 5 June 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Labour Party (S&D): 0 seats
  • Fianna Fáil (RE): 1–3 seats
  • Independent Ireland (RE): 1–2 seats
  • Independents (GUE/NGL): 0 seats
  • Independents 4 Change (GUE/NGL): 0 seats
  • Green Party (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Independents (*): 0 seats
  • Independents (RE): 0 seats
  • Fine Gael (EPP): 3–4 seats
  • Solidarity–People Before Profit (GUE/NGL): 0 seats
  • Social Democrats (GUE/NGL): 2–3 seats
  • Sinn Féin (GUE/NGL): 3–4 seats
  • Aontú (*): 0–1 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ireland Thinks for Sunday Independent, 5 June 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Ireland Thinks for Sunday Independent, 5 June 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Labour Party (S&D): 2.3–4.0%
  • Fianna Fáil (RE): 14.3–17.9%
  • Independent Ireland (RE): 7.7–10.5%
  • Independents (GUE/NGL): 1.3–2.6%
  • Independents 4 Change (GUE/NGL): 1.3–2.7%
  • Green Party (Greens/EFA): 2.3–4.0%
  • Independents (*): 1.9–3.5%
  • Independents (RE): 0.9–2.0%
  • Fine Gael (EPP): 17.2–21.0%
  • Solidarity–People Before Profit (GUE/NGL): 1.4–2.9%
  • Social Democrats (GUE/NGL): 10.5–13.7%
  • Sinn Féin (GUE/NGL): 18.1–22.0%
  • Aontú (*): 4.9–7.2%

item.description:

item.title: Opinion Poll by RED C for Business Post, 22–27 May 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by RED C for Business Post, 22–27 May 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Labour Party (S&D): 2.9–5.3%
  • Fianna Fáil (RE): 13.0–17.4%
  • Independent Ireland (RE): 5.6–8.8%
  • Independents (GUE/NGL): 1.4–3.3%
  • Independents 4 Change (GUE/NGL): 1.5–3.4%
  • Green Party (Greens/EFA): 2.1–4.2%
  • Independents (*): 2.2–4.3%
  • Independents (RE): 1.0–2.6%
  • Fine Gael (EPP): 14.8–19.5%
  • Solidarity–People Before Profit (GUE/NGL): 2.9–5.3%
  • Social Democrats (GUE/NGL): 8.3–12.0%
  • Sinn Féin (GUE/NGL): 18.6–23.6%
  • Aontú (*): 5.6–8.8%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ireland Thinks for Sunday Independent, 1 May 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Ireland Thinks for Sunday Independent, 1 May 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Labour Party (S&D): 3.2–5.0%
  • Fianna Fáil (RE): 15.3–18.9%
  • Independent Ireland (RE): 7.8–10.5%
  • Independents (GUE/NGL): 1.3–2.6%
  • Independents 4 Change (GUE/NGL): 1.3–2.6%
  • Green Party (Greens/EFA): 2.3–3.9%
  • Independents (*): 2.0–3.4%
  • Independents (RE): 0.9–2.0%
  • Fine Gael (EPP): 15.3–18.9%
  • Solidarity–People Before Profit (GUE/NGL): 1.4–2.7%
  • Social Democrats (GUE/NGL): 7.8–10.5%
  • Sinn Féin (GUE/NGL): 20.1–24.0%
  • Aontú (*): 5.9–8.3%
